name: Regatta Acacia Patio Rocking Loveseat: Weather-Resistant, 2-Seater - Christopher Knight Home
description: Cherish valuable time with family on this old fashioned Christopher Knight Home Regatta Acacia Patio Glider. Built for two to enjoy, you will find yourself lost for hours on this soothing piece, a welcome addition to any porch, patio, or backyard sitting area. The weather resistant acacia wood will hold up to the elements. Make this classically inspired outdoor Christopher Knight Home Regatta Acacia Patio Glider a part of your family's legacy for generations to come. A purchase you will not regret.
